title: IT Setup Guide
excerpt: VPN setup instructions for remote access
answer: Connect to the corporate VPN using the IT-provided client. Your credentials are in the welcome email. Download the VPN client from the IT portal and follow the setup wizard.

title: HR Benefits Portal
answer: Benefits enrollment opens on your first day. Visit the HR portal within 30 days to select your health, dental, and vision plans. Contact HR at benefits@company.com for questions.

title: Onboarding Handbook
answer: Your onboarding buddy is assigned by your manager and listed in your welcome email. They are your go-to person for questions during your first 30 days.

title: Team Wiki
answer: Team documentation is available on the internal wiki. Start with the 'Getting Started' section in your team's space. Ask your buddy for the direct link to your team's wiki page.

title: Developer Setup Guide
answer: Follow the Developer Setup Guide to configure your IDE, install required tools, and clone repositories. IT will provide your laptop and access credentials on Day 1.

title: HR Policy Handbook
answer: PTO accrual begins from your start date. Review the HR Policy Handbook for accrual rates and request procedures. Submit PTO requests through the HR portal.
